answer:
I recently attended a talk by a local environmental activist named Sarah. She spoke about the importance of reducing plastic waste in our daily lives. She shared some really eye-opening facts about how much plastic ends up in the ocean and the impact it has on wildlife. She also gave practical tips on how we can all make small changes, like using reusable bags and bottles.
I really liked the talk. Sarah was super engaging and made a potentially dry topic feel urgent and important. She had this way of making everyone in the room feel like they could make a difference. Her passion was contagious, and she left us with actionable steps that felt doable. It was one of those talks that made me want to go home and start making some changes right away. It was inspiring and left me feeling hopeful about what we can achieve if we all pitch in.
title: Tell me about a talk you heard. Who gave it? What did they talk about? Did you like it? Why or why not?
extData:
{"pronuncFile":"/20250121/195f98a4a5094df7bcc32e04e4b136ea.mp3","answerTemplate":"开场陈述：
首先，介绍你听的讲座和演讲者："Recently, I had the opportunity to listen to a talk given by [speaker's name], which focused on [main topic of the talk]."
正文：
演讲者和主题：
"Speaker [name] is known for [background or expertise]. In this talk, they discussed [specific aspects of the topic, such as challenges, solutions, or interesting insights]."

个人感受：
"I found the talk to be [adjective such as inspiring, thought-provoking, or informative] because [reason why you liked or disliked it]."
例如："I found the talk to be inspiring because the clarity of the presentation made complex issues easy to understand."
讲座中的例子：
"For example, [mention a specific point or story the speaker shared], which resonated with me because [explain why that example was impactful]."

结论：
总结你对讲座的整体印象："In conclusion, I believe that [summarize your overall impression of the talk]."
最后的想法："This talk not only [impact of the talk on you, such as changed my perspective or motivated me to take action], but also reaffirmed my belief in [related personal belief or value]."
","titleTranslate":"请告诉我你听过的一场演讲。是谁讲的？他们讲了什么？你喜欢这场演讲吗？为什么喜欢或不喜欢？"}
